title: Global regulators tighten AI disclosure and safety requirements
title_en: Global regulators tighten AI disclosure and safety requirements
summary: 多國監管機構更新 AI 透明度與風險揭露規範，企業需強化模型治理與稽核流程。

title: AP tracks newsroom adoption of generative AI tools
title_en: AP tracks newsroom adoption of generative AI tools
summary: 新聞機構加速導入生成式 AI 於整理、標註與多語內容製作，但仍以編輯把關為核心。

title: Bloomberg highlights AI capital spending by hyperscalers
title_en: Bloomberg highlights AI capital spending by hyperscalers
summary: 大型雲端與平台公司持續擴大 AI 基礎設施投資，市場關注資本支出回收與獲利節奏。

title: Financial Times examines enterprise AI strategy and governance
title_en: Financial Times examines enterprise AI strategy and governance
summary: 企業在導入 AI 時，逐步從試點轉向規模化，並把資料治理與責任分工列為決策重點。

title: WSJ reports intense AI talent competition across big tech
title_en: WSJ reports intense AI talent competition across big tech
summary: 科技巨頭在模型、晶片與產品落地上競爭加劇，帶動 AI 人才薪資與併購動態升溫。

title: Reuters covers AI chip supply and advanced packaging constraints
title_en: Reuters covers AI chip supply and advanced packaging constraints
summary: AI 晶片需求維持高檔，先進封裝與供應鏈交期管理成為半導體產業焦點。

title: Bloomberg tracks monetization pressure on consumer AI products
title_en: Bloomberg tracks monetization pressure on consumer AI products
summary: 消費端 AI 產品從使用者成長走向商業化驗證，訂閱模式與企業合作是主要觀察指標。

title: FT analyzes policy impact on cross-border AI model deployment
title_en: FT analyzes policy impact on cross-border AI model deployment
summary: 跨境模型部署須因應在地法規與資料主權要求，企業逐步採取區域化 AI 架構。

title: AP reviews AI use in public services and civic operations
title_en: AP reviews AI use in public services and civic operations
summary: 公共部門導入 AI 著重效率與服務品質，同時必須建立公平性與問責機制。

title: WSJ details enterprise demand for secure private AI deployments
title_en: WSJ details enterprise demand for secure private AI deployments
summary: 企業偏好私有化與可控的 AI 部署方式，以兼顧資料安全、合規與可觀測性。
